_comment: Identity overrides applied by scripts/build-mysuperpower.ps1 onto the pristine upstream manifests when assembling dist/. Source manifests stay pristine so upstream merges remain clean. Version is intentionally NOT overridden so dist/ inherits the upstream base version.

plugin.name: my-superpower
plugin.description: Personal HTML-native fork of Superpowers: brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows that emit self-contained HTML docs.
